meaning: adj.鍗婂啘鏉戠殑 鍗婂啘涓氱殑
examples: Gandhi, brought out of his semirural setting and given a Western-style education, initially attempted to become more English than the English.
Last year some officials praised Shunyi, a semirural suburb popular among expatriates, for controlling population growth.
So at age 20 he joined with a friend to buy a run-down record store in a semirural suburb called Packenham.
